description: Passwords, API keys, or secrets must never be hardcoded in source
edge_case_handling: Environment variable or secret manager recommendation required

description: All user or external input must be sanitized and validated
edge_case_handling: Partial validation (e.g., only length) still flagged

description: Control flows must have termination conditions or timeouts
edge_case_handling: Intentional long-running processes require explicit comment + timeout

description: External API calls must implement rate limiting and backoff
edge_case_handling: Retry logic must be exponential backoff

description: All potential failure points must have explicit error handling and logging
edge_case_handling: Custom exceptions must be caught at appropriate level

description: Dependencies must use pinned versions or lockfiles
Must address OWASP Top 10 risks where applicable
edge_case_handling: Medical/financial code raises severity to critical
